ButtonName - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的类
Well-known button and axis name constants for use with IControllerState.isButtonPressed(String) and IControllerState.getAxisValue(String).

ControlFlex public API.

ControlFlex public API entry point.

G

GENERIC - enum class 中的枚举常量 com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControllerType
 
getActionStateProvider() - 类中的静态方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControlFlexApi
Get the action state provider for querying game/GUI action states.
getActiveGameActions() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IActionStateProvider
Get all currently active game-layer action IDs.
getActiveGuiActions() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IActionStateProvider
Get all currently active GUI-layer action IDs.
getApiVersion() - 类中的静态方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControlFlexApi
Get the API version string (e.g., "1.0.0").
getAxisValue(String) - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState
Query an analog axis value by name string.
getCapabilities() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IInputProvider
Get the hardware capabilities of the currently connected controller.
getControllerState() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IInputProvider
Get the current controller state.
getControllerType() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Controller type classification.
getGamepadIndex() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IInputProvider
Get the index of the currently selected gamepad.
getGamepadName() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IInputProvider
Get the name of the currently selected gamepad.
getInputProvider() - 类中的静态方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControlFlexApi
Get the input provider for querying controller hardware state.
getLeftStickX() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState
 
getLeftStickY() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState
 
getLeftTrigger() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState
 
getModId() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControlFlexPlugin
The mod ID of the bridge mod implementing this plugin.
getPaddleCount() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Number of rear paddles (0 if none).
getPlayerStateRegistry() - 类中的静态方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControlFlexApi
Get the player state registry for third-party mod states.
getRightStickX() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState
 
getRightStickY() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState
 
getRightTrigger() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerState

H

hasAnalogTriggers() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Whether the controller has analog triggers (vs. digital).
hasGyro() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Whether the controller supports gyroscope (motion sensors).
hasPaddles() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Whether the controller has rear paddles.
hasRumble() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Whether the controller supports haptic feedback (rumble).
hasTouchpad() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControllerCapabilities
Whether the controller has a clickable touchpad.

I

IActionStateProvider - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的接口
Provides read-only access to ControlFlex's action state tracking.
IControlFlexPlugin - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的接口
SPI interface for bridge mods to integrate with ControlFlex.
IControllerCapabilities - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的接口
Read-only view of controller hardware capabilities.
IControllerState - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的接口
Read-only live view of a controller's hardware state.
IInputProvider - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的接口
Provides read-only access to the controller's hardware state.
InputMode - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的Enum Class
Describes the current input mode of the player.
IPlayerStateRegistry - com.ifels.controlflex.api中的接口
Registry for third-party mod states that can influence ControlFlex behavior.
isAvailable() - 类中的静态方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControlFlexApi
Check if ControlFlex is installed and initialized.

O

onControlFlexReady() - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControlFlexPlugin
Called when ControlFlex is fully initialized and all API providers are available.

Called when the controller connection state changes.
onInstallCompatConfigs(File) - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControlFlexPlugin
Export compat configuration files from this bridge mod's JAR into the cfx-mod/ directory.
onInstallGuideAssets(File) - 接口中的方法 com.ifels.controlflex.api.IControlFlexPlugin
Export guide configuration files from this bridge mod's JAR into the cfx-mod/ directory.

Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
